name: Open Redirect via unsanitized redirect target
description: User-controlled input from request.args or request.form flows into flask.redirect() without validation. An attacker can craft a link that redirects victims to a malicious site for phishing or credential theft.
remediation: Validate redirect targets against an allowlist of known safe paths or hostnames. Use url_for() for internal redirects. Parse the target URL and verify the scheme is http/https and the host matches your domain before redirecting.
